body:
## Status: Already implemented (re-run 2026-06-27)

All 3 comparison pairs and all 3 LLM files were fully implemented in prior commits:
- `04a0e06d` (#3005): Added 3 entries to `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js`
- `ee1589b4` (#3035): Added 3 LLM files under `public/llms/comparisons/`
- `f75eb687` (#3014): Recorded initial agent run state
- `eb75ac09` (#3054): Recorded second run state (already-implemented check)

This run (2026-06-27) verified:
- `tomas-haake-vs-blake-richardson` at line 1014 of drummerComparisons.js — complete with style/technique/gear/influence/verdict/4 FAQs
- `shannon-larkin-vs-jay-weinberg` at line 1037 — complete with 4 FAQs
- `flo-mounier-vs-george-kollias` at line 1060 — complete with 4 FAQs
- All 3 LLM files present in public/llms/comparisons/ (6KB-8KB each)
- JS syntax: node --check passed clean
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison pairs batch 31 — tomas-haake-vs-blake-richardson + shannon-larkin-vs-jay-weinberg + flo-mounier-vs-george-kollias (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
